mapper.select: SELECT picture_id AS pictureId, SUM(CASE WHEN action_type = 0 THEN action_value ELSE 0 END) AS impressionCount, SUM(CASE WHEN action_type = 1 THEN action_value ELSE 0 END) AS clickCount, SUM(CASE WHEN action_type = 2 THEN action_value ELSE 0 END) AS viewCount, SUM(CASE WHEN action_type = 3 THEN action_value ELSE 0 END) AS likeCount, SUM(CASE WHEN action_type = 4 THEN action_value ELSE 0 END) AS collectCount, SUM(CASE WHEN action_type = 5 THEN action_value ELSE 0 END) AS downloadCount, SUM(CASE WHEN action_type = 6 THEN action_value ELSE 0 END) AS shareCount FROM user_picture_action GROUP BY picture_id
